---
title: "Species Flash Cards"
output:
  html_document:
    includes:
       in_header: GA_Script.html
---

```{=html}
<style>
    #flashcard-app {
        max-width: 900px;
        margin: 0 auto;
        padding: 10px 20px 30px 20px;
    }
    #flashcard-app textarea {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 700px;
        min-height: 100px;
        padding: 10px;
        font-size: 14px;
        border: 1px solid #ccc;
        border-radius: 4px;
        resize: vertical;
        box-sizing: border-box;
    }
    #flashcard-app label.app-label {
        display: block;
        font-weight: bold;
        margin-bottom: 6px;
        margin-top: 12px;
        font-size: 14px;
    }
    #flashcard-app button {
        display: inline-block;
        padding: 10px 22px;
        margin: 10px 8px 10px 0;
        font-size: 15px;
        border: none;
        border-radius: 4px;
        cursor: pointer;
        color: #fff;
    }
    #flashcard-app #newImageBtn {
        background: #27ae60;
    }
    #flashcard-app #newImageBtn:hover {
        background: #1e8c4c;
    }
    #flashcard-app #newImageBtn:disabled {
        background: #95a5a6;
        cursor: not-allowed;
    }
    #flashcard-app #picture {
        margin-top: 16px;
        min-height: 40px;
    }
    #flashcard-app #picture img {
        max-width: 100%;
        max-height: 600px;
        border-radius: 6px;
        box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
    }
    #flashcard-app #credit {
        margin-top: 8px;
        font-size: 14px;
        color: #555;
    }
    #flashcard-app #status {
        margin-top: 10px;
        font-size: 14px;
        color: #666;
    }
    #flashcard-app.footer {
        margin-top: 30px;
        font-size: 13px;
        color: #777;
        line-height: 1.7;
    }
    #flashcard-app.footer a {
        color: #2980b9;
    }
</style>

<div id="flashcard-app">

    <p>Enter species below (common or scientific names, comma-separated), then
    click <strong>New image</strong>. Mouseover the image to reveal the answer.</p>

    <label class="app-label" for="speciesArea">Species list</label>
    <textarea id="speciesArea">Ipomoea purpurea, Chamaecrista nictitans, Desmodium paniculatum, Ipomoea coccinea, Toxicodendron radicans, Parthenocissus quinquefolia, Oxalis stricta, Trifolium pratense, Oenothera biennis, Fagopyrum esculentum, Clematis terniflora, Ipomoea pandurata, Impatiens capensis, Lobelia cardinalis, Persicaria punctata, Cuscuta gronovii, Amphicarpaea bracteata, Agrimonia parviflora, Lycopus rubellus, Lespedeza cuneata, Acalypha rhomboidea, Phyla lanceolata, Daucus carota, Fallopia japonica, Rudbeckia fulgida, Helenium autumnale, Agalinis purpurea, Typha latifolia, Spiranthes cernua, Oxypolis rigidior, Iva annua, Chamaecrista fasciculata</textarea>

    <br>
    <button id="newImageBtn">New image!</button>

    <div id="status"></div>
    <div id="picture"></div>
    <div id="credit"></div>

    <div class="footer">
        This is made possible due to
        <a href="https://www.inaturalist.org/">iNaturalist.org</a> and all
        their users who make observations and help identify species, but it is
        in no way affiliated with them; if this app is having issues, please
        contact <a href="mailto:omeara.brian@gmail.com">Brian O'Meara</a>,
        not the good iNaturalist folks. Source code:
        <a href="https://github.com/bomeara/SpeciesFlashCards">GitHub</a>.
    </div>

</div>
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

app = {
    const btn       = document.getElementById('newImageBtn');
    const textarea  = document.getElementById('speciesArea');
    const pictureEl = document.getElementById('picture');
    const creditEl  = document.getElementById('credit');
    const statusEl  = document.getElementById('status');

    btn.addEventListener('click', async function () {
        // Parse species list from textarea
        const speciesList = textarea.value.split(',').map(s => s.trim()).filter(s => s.length > 0);

        if (speciesList.length === 0) {
            statusEl.textContent = 'Please enter at least one species.';
            return;
        }

        // Pick a random species
        const species = speciesList[Math.floor(Math.random() * speciesList.length)];

        statusEl.textContent = 'Loading…';
        pictureEl.innerHTML  = '';
        creditEl.innerHTML   = '';
        btn.disabled = true;

        try {
            const resp = await fetch(
                'https://api.inaturalist.org/v1/observations?' +
                'q=' + encodeURIComponent(species) +
                '&quality_grade=research' +
                '&photos=true' +
                '&per_page=50' +
                '&order=desc&order_by=id'
            );
            const data = await resp.json();

            const withPhotos = (data.results || []).filter(
                obs => obs.photos && obs.photos.length > 0
            );

            if (withPhotos.length === 0) {
                statusEl.textContent =
                    'No research-grade photos found for "' + species + '". Try again!';
                btn.disabled = false;
                return;
            }

            const obs = withPhotos[Math.floor(Math.random() * withPhotos.length)];

            const sciName    = obs.taxon ? obs.taxon.name : (obs.species_guess || 'Unknown');
            const commonName = obs.taxon && obs.taxon.preferred_common_name
                                   ? obs.taxon.preferred_common_name
                                   : '';
            const imageUrl   = obs.photos[0].url.replace('square', 'medium');
            const userLogin  = obs.user ? obs.user.login : 'unknown';

            const titleText = commonName
                ? commonName + ' (' + sciName + ')'
                : sciName;

            pictureEl.innerHTML =
                '<img src="' + imageUrl +
                '" title="' + titleText +
                '" alt="Identify this species">';

            creditEl.innerHTML =
                'Photo by <a href="https://www.inaturalist.org/people/' +
                userLogin + '">' + userLogin +
                '</a> on <a href="https://www.inaturalist.org/">iNaturalist</a>';

            statusEl.textContent = '';
        } catch (e) {
            statusEl.textContent = 'Error fetching data: ' + e.message;
            console.error(e);
        }

        btn.disabled = false;
    });
}
```
